channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Python (Monthly)

item.title: 🐍 microsoft/SkillOpt (5090 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: microsoft

📝 Repository: microsoft/SkillOpt

📄 Descrizione: SkillOpt is a text-space optimizer that trains reusable natural-language skills for frozen LLM agents through trajectory-driven edits, validation-gated updates, and deployable best_skill.md artifacts.

⭐ Stelle: 5090

🍴 Forks: 505

💻 Linguaggio: Python

item.description:
👤 Owner: XBuilderLAB

📝 Repository: XBuilderLAB/cheat-on-content
